Container.Name: trace
Container.Overview:
Trace is a clean, secure, and lightning-fast WHOIS, IP, and ASN lookup utility built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - High-performance TCP WHOIS registry socket queries. - Multi-provider IP Geolocation fallback logic. - Comprehensive RIPEstat and PeeringDB ASN details. - Mobile-responsive design, dynamic theme toggling, and print stylesheet. - Offline support via Progressive Web App (PWA) caching.
Container.Requires: Ensure the App Data volume is mapped if you want to store configuration (.env) files and logs. Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box. Ensure the mapped host appdata folder has read/write permissions for UID 99 / GID 100.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4404).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the interface. (Optional, not required. Leave empty for unlocked public mode.)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for configuration and logs.
